items.caption: A collection of currency symbols from various countries, rendered in a three-dimensional gold color. each symbol is distinct, representing a different currency. the symbols are arranged in a grid format, with each row dedicated to a specific currency. the background is a stark white, which contrasts with the golden hue of the currency symbols, making them stand out prominently. the symbols are arranged in a way that allows for easy comparison and identification of each currency. the image does not contain any text or additional elements, focusing solely on the currency symbols.
